ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team competing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (WON/LOST) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter's record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being tracked */,
  "q1_score" REAL /* Score in the first quarter */,
  "q2_score" REAL /* Score in the second quarter */,
  "q3_score" REAL /* Score in the third quarter */,
  "q4_score" REAL /* Score in the fourth quarter */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score for the game */,
  "quarter_time" TEXT /* Time when the quarter ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the league */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the stats */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" REAL /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Blocks made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience coaching */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Injury, Penalty) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the standings record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" REAL /* Total points conceded by the team */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of officiating experience */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Level of certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Manager) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_referees" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the referee (e.g., Umpire, Assistant Umpire) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)
